content: SAM2 checkpoint/setup gotchas: checkpoints are downloaded via a bash script (./checkpoints/download_ckpts.sh) or curl per-checkpoint — not auto-fetched by pip install, so a fresh clone with no checkpoints present will fail confusingly at model-build time rather than at install time. Version-mismatch gotcha: loading SAM 2.1 checkpoints against an older SAM2 repo checkout throws RuntimeError: Error(s) in loading state_dict for SAM2Base — fix is reinstalling the latest repo matching the checkpoint version. No first-run-specific MPS slowness was documented directly, but torch.compile-based optimizations (vos_optimized=True) are CUDA-oriented and may not help/may not be supported on MPS, so first inference call after model load should be expected to be slow (JIT warmup) independent of checkpoint version.
